headline: Subscribe for product stories, release notes, and monetization updates
subheadline: Use the newsletter as the low-friction path for readers who are interested but not ready to buy yet. It turns content traffic into an owned audience instead of a one-time visit.

sections.title: What subscribers get
sections.description: Expect one useful update at a time: new stories, launch notes, product changes, and practical lessons from running AI-assisted delivery.

sections.title: Why it matters
sections.description: A newsletter creates an owned marketing channel that is independent of paid traffic, social volatility, or search ranking swings.

sections.title: How it fits the funnel
sections.description: Readers who are too early for checkout can still enter the system, receive proof over time, and convert later.

cta.heading: Move from light interest into a real buying path when the timing is right.
cta.body: Subscribers can later progress into products, pricing, or a direct implementation conversation without starting from zero.

media.title: A reusable media lane for every content page
media.body: The same video and visual system can carry across blog, product, pricing, and newsletter surfaces while the content model matures.
